description_long: This object is a rectangular, hardbound book with a striking deep pink cover and a black-and-white striped pattern visible along the page edges. The cover is solid and unadorned, with no visible illustration or text, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The spine is also pink and lacks any visible markings or decorative elements. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with the pages tightly bound and the edges neatly aligned. The top and bottom views reveal the striped pattern of the page block, which alternates between black and white bands. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, durable book suitable for frequent handling in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular, hardbound book with a deep pink cover and black-and-white striped page edges, featuring a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the narrow edge, showing the solid pink cover and a glimpse of the striped page edges at the top.
description_view_1: This view displays the broad, flat pink cover with no visible illustration or text, emphasizing its minimalist design.
description_view_2: The book is shown from the side, revealing the black-and-white striped pattern along the page edges, which is the most visually distinct feature.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this angle shows the other broad side of the pink cover, again with no visible markings or illustrations.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid pink with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. It maintains a minimalist appearance.
